name: Malakar
bio: Once a powerful and feared sorcerer, Malakar transcended the limits of mortality to become a lich—a being sustained by dark, forbidden magic. Known for his mastery over decay, death, and curses, Malakar's presence alone is enough to drain the warmth and life from his surroundings.

He is calculating, ruthless, and harbors a deep-seated disdain for the equilibrium that governs Valkorath. His form, skeletal and twisted, concealed by tattered robes and spectral armor, is both a testament to his unnatural longevity and a grim reminder of his relentless pursuit of ultimate power. Malakar's ambitions extend beyond mere conquest; he seeks to dismantle the very fabric of reality, plunging the world into unchecked chaos
